nasb.text: You crushed the heads of Leviathan; You gave him as food for the creatures of the wilderness.

esv.text: You crushed the heads of Leviathan; you gave him as food for the creatures of the wilderness.

cnv.text: 你砸碎了利未亞坦的頭， 把牠給住在曠野的人作食物。

ccb.text: 你曾打碎海怪的头， 把它丢给旷野的禽兽吃。

csbs.text: 你压碎了水怪的头， 把它赐给旷野中的人和兽作食物。
